name: daily-fresh gate does not block dry-run mode invocations regardless of last_fetch_at
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'dry_run=true' out.txt && grep -q 'fresh_skip=bypassed' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
